mission.title: headlamp: external auth (exec) not working (azure/kubelogin and aws-iam-authenticator)
mission.description: external auth (exec) not working (azure/kubelogin and aws-iam-authenticator). Requested by 13+ users.

steps.title: Check current headlamp deployment
steps.description:
Verify your headlamp version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n headlamp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=headlamp
helm list -n headlamp 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working headlamp installation.

steps.title: Review headlamp configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant headlamp configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n headlamp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=headlamp
kubectl get configmap -n headlamp -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=headlamp
```
I tried connecting to our prod clusters using "azure/kubelogin" and aws-iam-authenticator.

None of these Auth Methods worked.

steps.title: Apply the fix for external auth (exec) not working (azure/kubelogin and…
steps.description:
On at least MacOS, GUI apps do not take on the shell PATH.
However they are needed for kubectl auth plugins, and perhaps other binaries like minikube

### How to test

- How to test: 
    - change main.ts `pathInfoDebug = true` 
    - make app-macos
    - Run the macos app from the Finder (do not
```yaml
exec:
    apiVersion: ...
    command: ...
    args: ...
```

steps.title: Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n headlamp -l app.kubernetes.io/name=headlamp
kubectl get events -n headlamp --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "external auth (exec) not working (azure/kubelogin and…" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary: On at least MacOS, GUI apps do not take on the shell PATH.
codeSnippets:
- name: rancher
  user:
    exec:
      apiVersion: client.authentication.k8s.io/v1beta1
      args:
      - keychain
      - user@cluster
      command: kubectl-passman
      env: null
      interactiveMode: IfAvailable
      provideClusterInfo: false

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with headlamp installed or the issue environment reproducible.
